full_text:
Zhang Bu 張布
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Bu (張布). Close friend to Sun Xiu. Executed Sun Chen with Ding Feng. Installed Sun Hao. Zhang Bu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhang Bu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
